If your lord remains alive and needs loyal retainers to restore his house's honor through service and redemption, staying alive to serve that cause is the greater duty. In either case, act only after seeking counsel from those closest to your lord, as hasty decisions dishonor rather than restore honor.

The samurai code values **loyalty through living service** as much as through sacrifice.
